title: After the Oka Sho: This Doesn’t Feel Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Sweep Tosho's amazing performance
causes a wave of excitement at the Oka Sho, the
bulk of attention still goes to the Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, when the runners on the Triple
Tiara tour are gathered for an interview
concerning their future plans, Sweep Tosho
declares that she's going to change everyone's
"lame" assumptions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First, she plans to win the Triple Tiara. Then, in
her senior year, she's going to change the world
by defeating the Triple Crown tour runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the second race of the Triple
Tiara tour—the Japanese Oaks. A fierce battle to
decide the Queen of the Oaks awaits our little
witch.
